20.    The coefficient of   in the expansion of 4    1   2   3   1    4      is



       A       28

       B       72

       C       78

       D       192

       E       240

       F       310

       G       312




                                       END OF TEST

stem.rawText:
13


20.    The coefficient of   in the expansion of 4    1   2   3   1    4      is

solution.rawText:
We expand each of the terms up to the term in x2 using the binomial theorem:

                     (1 + 2x + 3x2 )6 = 1 + 6(2x + 3x2 ) + 15(2x + 3x2 )2 + · · ·
                                       = 1 + 12x + 18x2 + 15(4x2 + · · · ) + · · ·
                                       = 1 + 12x + 78x2 + · · ·
                           (1 + 4x3 )5 = 1 + 5(4x3 ) + · · · = 1 + · · ·

so the whole expression is

     (4 − x2 )[(1 + 2x + 3x2 )6 − (1 + 4x3 )5 ] = (4 − x2 )[(1 + 12x + 78x2 + · · · ) − (1 + · · · )]
                                                 = (4 − x2 )(12x + 78x2 + · · · )
                                                 = 4(12x + 78x2 + · · · ) − · · ·
                                                 = 48x + 312x2 + · · ·

so the coefficient of x2 is 312, and the answer is G.
